If it's the standard unit selector item then i would recommend you to:

- either save them so you can complete the enlightenment level of units that only need 1 dupe left to reach your quotas then you can stop pulling on that realm banner and switch to another one
- or use them on someone you don't own so you can get 50 radix ( currency from shop ) when you get a dupe, when unlocking an unit you don't get 50 radix btw, only when you dupe them, also item selector for duped doesn't give radix
